title: Roasted Uruguayan Beef Skewers
description: A weeknight Uruguayan dish featuring roasted beef skewers with a unique blend of flavors, wrapped in pandan leaves for a snappy and aromatic meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, vanilla extract, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Wrap each skewer with a pandan leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the beef is cooked through.
While the skewers are cooking, mix the chopped nuka-pickle with a pinch of salt.
After the skewers have roasted for 10 minutes, brush the nuka-pickle mixture evenly over the beef.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
